nasb.text: You also took your beautiful jewels made of My gold and of My silver, which I had given you, and made for yourself male images that you might play the harlot with them.

esv.text: You also took your beautiful jewels of my gold and of my silver, which I had given you, and made for yourself images of men, and with them played the whore.

cnv.text: 你又拿了我送給你那些美麗的金器銀器，為自己鑄造男人的像，與那些像行淫。

ccb.text: 你用我给你的金银首饰为自己制造男人的像，与他们苟合。
